known_limits: The public Phantom is already opened and is only one independent field.
Preflight checks contracts, hashes, arithmetic, deterministic splits, and closed claims; it does not run the forward model or optimizer.
The split broker and mount isolation are specified but not yet implemented or negatively tested.
RQWU matches physical ray-quadrature work, not end-to-end FLOPs or wall time.
No model checkpoint, reconstruction metric, generalization result, or paper result exists at this stage.
next_authorized_action: Implement a fail-closed split broker and role guards, then a runner with parameter-gradient and budget tests. Commit both before a no-result mechanical dry-run. Formal training remains closed.
